$comment: Consumer registry for @vulcn/quality surfaces (doctrine P2.7, Forum 0db70efc; VLCN-631). A surface with no registered consumer is mis-homed — name the consuming repo+workflow before building a surface, and register it here in the same PR. status 'active' requires a VERIFIED consumer (fetch the consuming workflow, e.g. gh api repos/<owner>/<repo>/contents/<workflow> — never invent one). status 'unconsumed' is the honest empty state: src/surface-parity.test.ts enforces coverage + row shape (blocking) and console.warns unconsumed surfaces (warn-tier — consumer resolution never blocks this repo's CI).

surfaces.notes: No consumer found (gh search code over olivergale + ex-nihilo-labs, 2026-06-09). enex Tier-2 adoption ticket VLCN-609 was canceled 2026-06-09.

manifold-review (vulcn-manifold bin/manifold review) is the intended Tier-2 dispatcher and independently implements the union-of-blockers shape, but imports nothing from this repo (vulcn-manifold src/+bin/ grep + gh search, 2026-06-09). enex ticket VLCN-612 canceled 2026-06-09.
ACTIVE 2026-06-11: composed at tier 0 via the same aexodus quality.yml caller as web-smoke; ran green on aexodus#10.
No committed lighthouserc generated from surfaces/perf found outside this repo (2026-06-09). enex ticket VLCN-611 canceled 2026-06-09.

aexodus site/qa/visual.spec.ts runs native toHaveScreenshot and states 'no @vulcn/quality dependency until that package is published — VLCN-602' (file fetched 2026-06-09). enex ticket VLCN-610 canceled 2026-06-09.

ACTIVE 2026-06-11: aexodus#10 merged — Tier-0 caller of the reusable quality.yml@v0.3.1 (base_url aexodus-2026.webflow.io, quality/tier.spec.ts registerTier); ran green on the PR (52s). Informational check (calibrate-then-ratchet). Their native site/qa pack runs alongside.

ACTIVE 2026-06-11: aexodus#10 merged — platform/src/index.ts imports isEmail/constantTimeEqual from @vulcn/quality/surfaces/worker-contract (git-dep #v0.3.0); platform/src/index.contract.test.ts (vitest-pool-workers, 10 tests) uses isFailClosedStatus. Contract test runs in the local preflight; aexodus manifold-eval.yml runs platform typecheck only — CI test leg is a consumer-side follow-up.
